title: Music Disc Expansion
description:
🎶Add some extra noise to your Worlds. Adds 50+ Music Discs, ranging from all types of genres from many artists. 

🎸Play select songs in a Music Festival to show off your skills.
body:
![Mod Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/801f99c2c297f30a3338e971d4882e193ac65671.png)
🎶Add some extra noise to your Worlds. Adds **50+** Music Discs, ranging from all types of genres from many artists. As well as back porting newer vanilla discs.

![Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed4e2498dad50db84516ea1e20ae2958c9f915fe_0.webp)
⛏️Find discs in unexplored vanilla structures, craft new ones and **gamble** your odds for exclusives.

![Music Festival (Minigame)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56327ce73277eabcefbee89ab8a36d372a0e7914.png)
🎸Play select songs in a **Music Festival** to show off your skills. 

![Playing Music Festival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19bec012215dc9b13894e1226006367cb8df9a55.png)
🎼**Play** earn **score** and get **rewards**. Maybe you can exchange some of your earnings for pure **diamonds**. If you have any questions let me know.

Full music playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLyBhiSZqwuxbohmrsiLSJIbWXINjLjYfX 

**Commands and other important information:**
- **/reloadfestival** - If an update comes out or the music game is broken, type this in chat to regenerate the entire dimension.
- **/stats** - Flex your stats based on the points you've scored.
- **/audiolatency** - Add or remove delay from when a song will start playing.
- **/noteparticles** - Set the amount of break particles per note (default: half). 
- **/toolorder** - Set your preferred tool layout. 
- **/shop** - Convert between your gold and diamond stars, or find podiums around the festival to trade.


**If you decide to remove the mod please follow:**
- **open level.dat** and **remove tag** from **"music_disc_expansion:music_game"**
  _(Data > WorldGenSettings > dimensions > music_disc_expansion:music_game)_ 
  
This will save your world from possible corruption
